synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2025-23310 Oracle Linux 9 php bug fix and enhancement update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-23310
description:
[8.0.30-4]
- Fix pgsql extension does not check for errors during escaping
  CVE-2025-1735
- Fix NULL Pointer Dereference in PHP SOAP Extension via Large XML Namespace Prefix
  CVE-2025-6491
- Fix Null byte termination in hostnames
  CVE-2025-1220
- Fix soap memory corruption
- Fix ldap_set_option() not applied on different ldap connections
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-23310

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-23310.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
php-8.0.30-4.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
php-bcmath-8.0.30-4.el9_7.x86_64.rpm

Description of changes:

[8.0.30-4]
- Fix pgsql extension does not check for errors during escaping
  CVE-2025-1735
- Fix NULL Pointer Dereference in PHP SOAP Extension via Large XML Namespace Prefix
  CVE-2025-6491
- Fix Null byte termination in hostnames
  CVE-2025-1220
- Fix soap memory corruption
- Fix ldap_set_option() not applied on different ldap connections
